text:
met this guy in dubai who helps people "restructure wealth internationally"

drives a $3M pagani
has 7 passports
definitely not laundering money ()

his system for making money untouchable:

(posting this from a VPN)

the "Dubai Stack":
- dubai company (0% tax)
- estonian

i had a mentor once. not some guru mf. a legit psychopath who’d built and lost two empires by 40.

i asked him for the secret to winning...

he just looked at me with dead eyes, the kind of eyes that have seen real fucking war, and said:

"i hope you fail. i hope you lose it all.

i have a friend who's a genius. 
legit 160 iq.
and he's fucking broke.

he spends his life thinking, researching, perfecting his "ideas."

last year, i took one of his half-baked concepts, wrapped it in an aura of pure, psychotic confidence, and built a $10k/month business around

tried to rent a porsche in europe

used one of my model's details

tried to pay €8000 cash
"we don't take cash"

btc?
"no crypto"

wire?
"account needs to be in her name"

ach?
"no"

card
"needs to be in her name"

biz lesson #9:

accept all forms of payments

fucking retards

a kid DM'd me. he had no money, no skills. pathetic.

i told him to go to the most expensive lounge in his city.

i said, "your only job is to sit there for 4 hours a day. you are not allowed to leave."

week 1, he felt like a fraud.
week 2, he started to absorb the conversations

dad: "get a real job"

me: shows bank account

dad: "that's not sustainable"

me: shows monthly recurring revenue

dad: "but what about benefits?"

me: buys him a car

dad: "...what do you do again?"

this conversation happened monthly

for two fucking years

he'd forward me job

hired a russian model for Zoom calls
our close rate jumped 43%

but only when she said absolutely nothing

here's how we discovered sales psychology's dark secret:

client kept rescheduling calls
always "too busy"
classic time-waster

my sales guy was frustrated
"let me try

I met this guy on a Zoom call and thought he was high

He had no website
No case studies
No Calendly
No structure
No clue what ghostwriting even was

But he had one thing: balls

He would send 50 messages a day on LinkedIn pitching cold-ass execs on helping them “build thought
